title: Write a Markdown header with a title and subtitle
scenario: Create a Markdown header with a title and subtitle. The title should be in bold and the subtitle should be in italics.
constraints: Must contain the title and subtitle

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the Markdown header is formatted correctly with bold title and italic subtitle.
Check if the Markdown header meets the specified constraints (contains title and subtitle).
Assess if the Markdown header contains the correct data (title and subtitle).
